(2) verbatim ВЮИВџЕ В▓┤ьЂгвіћ вгИВъљ вІеВюё в╣ёЖхљ ьЋёВџћ Рђћ diff вЈёЖхг ВЌєВю╝вЕ┤ sha256 вўљвіћ ВѕўвЈЎ вїђВА░. ВЎёьЎћ: plan.json ВЏљв│ИВЮё в│ёвЈёвАю вАювЊюьЋўЖ│а diff вфЁВІюВаЂ ВѕўьќЅ.

issues.title: Migration ВІцьќЅ Ваёвъх (cutover vs incremental, phase ВѕюВёю)
issues.decision: Option A (Big-Bang Cutover) В▒ёьЃЮ. вІеВЮ╝ feature branch вѓ┤ 4-commit bisectable sequenceвАю ВІцьќЅ. Ж░Ђ commit Ж▓йЖ│ёвДѕвІц `bun run test:e2e` ВаёвЪЅ green Ж░ЋВаю. вИївъюВ╣ў ВѕўвфЁ ВЃЂьЋю 7ВЮ╝, вёўЖИ░вЕ┤ main rebase ьЏё ВъгЖ▓ђВдЮ. Phase 1 ВЎёвБї ВаЋВЮў(5Ж░ю AND): (1) 9 agents ВаёвХђ prompts.generated.tsВЌљВёю в╣ёВќ┤ВъѕВДђ ВЋіВЮђ в│ИвгИ вЁИВХю, (2) 5 skills вЈЎВЮ╝, (3) 9 agents ВаёВЏљ capabilityРєњopencode tool mapping Вё▒Ж│х (ERR_UNKNOWN_CAPABILITY/ERR_MISSING_MAPPING ВЌєВЮї), (4) e2e-prompt-parity.mjsвЦ╝ ┬Д8.7ВЮў 3Ж░ю(generated/coverage/loader-smoke)вАю В╣ўьЎўьЋю ВЃЂьЃюВЌљВёю 22 e2e ВаёвЪЅ green, (5) dist/index.jsЖ░ђ nexus-core вЪ░ьЃђВъё В░ИВА░ ВЌєВЮ┤ вАювЊю. Phase 1 в▓ћВюё ВаюВЎИ: tag ьЋИвЊцвЪг вЈЎВаЂ вЊ▒вАЮ(Q5, Issue #3 в│ёвЈё ьїљвІе), no_shell_exec ВаюВЋѕ(Issue #4), NATURAL_PLAN/RUN_PATTERNS В▓ўвдг, pipeline evaluator editsAllowed ьїеьё┤. ЖИ░Ж░Ђ: Option B(catalog/prompts/hooks/create-config ВќйьъўВЌљ ВЮўьЋю shotgun-surgery ВцЉЖ░ё ВЃЂьЃюЖ░ђ 1ВЮИ вдгви░Вќ┤ ьЎўЖ▓йВЌљВёю вІеВЮ╝ ьЂ░ PRв│┤вІц ВЮИВДђ вХђьЋў вєњВЮї), Option C(nexus-core body.mdЖ░ђ claude-nexus canonicalВЌљВёю importвљю в░ўвЕ┤ opencode-nexus ЖИ░ВА┤ prompts.tsвіћ HOW_OUTPUT/CHECK_OUTPUT/SHARED_EVIDENCE ьЋЕВё▒ в░ЕВІЮВю╝вАю drift Ж░ђвіЦВё▒ вєњВЋё diff Ж▓ђВдЮ ВЏљвдг ВъљВ▓┤ в»ИВё▒вдй Рђћ ВА┤ВъгВё▒ Ж▓ђВдЮВю╝вАю ВЎёьЎћьЋўвЕ┤ ┬Д8.7 e2e-prompts-generated.mjsВЎђ ВцЉв│хвљўВќ┤ в│ЉьќЅ ВаЋвІ╣Вё▒ ВєївЕИ).

how_summary.architect: Option A В▒ёьЃЮ Жи╝Ж▒░: (1) bridge 98KB ┬Д8ВЮ┤ ВЮ┤в»И cutover ВаёВаювАю ВЊ░ВЌг ┬Д8.5 prompts.ts ЖхљВ▓┤віћ generated ьїїВЮ╝Ж│╝ capability resolutionВЮ┤ Вцђв╣ёвљю ВЃЂьЃюВЌљВёю Вё▒вдй. (2) Option CВЮў diff Ж▓ђВдЮВЮђ в│ИвгИ driftвАю вг┤ВЮўв»ИьЋўвЕ░ ВА┤ВъгВё▒ Ж▓ђВдЮВЮђ ┬Д8.7Ж│╝ ВцЉв│х. (3) Option Bвіћ catalog/prompts/hooks/create-config вёц ьїїВЮ╝ВЮ┤ buildNexusSystemPrompt({agents,skills})ВЎђ buildToolPolicy(disallowedTools) ВДђВаљВЌљВёю Вќйьўђ ВцЉЖ░ё ВЃЂьЃюЖ░ђ leaky. (4) clean slate ВЃЂьЃю(в»ИВёцВ╣ў)Ж░ђ Big-Bang вљўвЈївд╝ в╣ёВџЕВЮё ВхюВєїьЎћ Рђћ git reset + bun install ьЋю ВїЇВю╝вАю в│хВЏљ. в│┤ВЎё: вІеВЮ╝ PRВЮ┤ ВЋёвІї вИївъюВ╣ў вѓ┤ 4-commit bisectable(deps+scaffold Рєњ generated barrel Рєњ capability resolution Рєњ e2e В╣ўьЎў). Warnings: W1 prepack build Ж░ЋВаю Рєњ commit Ж▓йЖ│ёвДѕвІц test:e2e Ж░ЋВаю, W2 ERR_* ьЋўвЊю ВІцьїеВЮў prepack ВўЂьќЦ Рєњ stable window 30ВЮ╝, W3 Option B в▓ѕв│х ВІю shotgun-surgery ВъгьЎЋВЮИ.

issues.title: Runtime Вєїв╣ё + generate-from-nexus-core lib ВъгВѓгВџЕ Ваёвъх (в│хВѓг ьЈгьїЁ vs nexus-core shared lib Ві╣Ж▓Е)
issues.decision: Option ╬│ (Hybrid Рђћ в│хВѓг ьЈгьїЁ + upstream ВаюВЋѕ) В▒ёьЃЮ. Phase 1ВЌљВёювіћ claude-nexusВЮў `generate-from-nexus-core.mjs`ВЎђ `generate-from-nexus-core.lib.mjs`вЦ╝ `scripts/` ьЋўВюёвАю в│хВѓг ьЈгьїЁьЋювІц. opencode В░еВЮ┤Ваљ ВѕўВаЋ: (1) MODEL_TIER_TO_CLAUDE Рєњ MODEL_TIER_TO_OPENCODE, (2) deriveDisallowedToolsВЮў capsMapВЮђ harness_mapping.opencode в░░ВЌ┤ ВХћВХю, (3) transformAgent/transformSkillВЮђ frontmatter emit вїђВІа TypeScript literal emit(┬Д8.2 canonical ьЈгвДи Рђћ AGENT_PROMPTS Record, AGENT_META RecordВЌљ disallowedTools ьЋ┤ВёЮ Ж▓░Ж│╝ inline), (4) loadHandledTagIdsFromGate()віћ opencode-nexusВЮў src/shared/tag-parser.tsВЌљВёю regexвАю ВХћВХю, (5) ВХюваЦ Ж▓йвАювіћ src/agents/prompts.generated.ts + src/skills/prompts.generated.ts. ВъгВѓгВџЕ ЖиИвїђвАю: verifyBodyHash, verifyTagDrift, SKILL_PURPOSE_OVERRIDE 5Ж░ю ВЃЂВѕў, verifyManifestVersion. ВаюЖ▒░: MAX_TURNS_MAP(Claude Code ВаёВџЕ maxTurns Ж░ювЁљ), FIELD_ORDER(frontmatter ВЌєВЮї, TS ьЃђВъЁ ВаЋВЮўвАю Ж░ЋВаю). HANDLED_TAG_IDS ВЃЂВѕў ВІаЖию вЈёВъЁ ВюёВ╣ў = src/shared/tag-parser.ts (ЖИ░ВА┤ ьЃюЖиИ regex ьїїВёюВЎђ Ж░ЎВЮђ ьїїВЮ╝, claude-nexus gate.ts ВЌГьЋа вїђВЮЉ, verifyTagDriftЖ░ђ ВЮ┤ ьїїВЮ╝ВЮё source of truthвАю regex ВХћВХю). в│хВѓг ВІюВаљВЌљ ВБ╝ВёЮВю╝вАю в▓ёВаё ьЃюЖ╣Ё: "Ported from: claude-nexus/generate-from-nexus-core.lib.mjs @ commit 94997d1". Runtime Вєїв╣ё в░ЕВІЮ: ┬Д8.3+┬Д8.2+┬Д8.6 canonical ВцђВѕў Рђћ devDependency, в╣ївЊю ьЃђВъё body.md/meta.yml/capabilities.yml ВЮйВќ┤ prompts.generated.tsВЌљ literal inline, catalog.ts as-is ВюаВДђ, generate-from-nexus-core.mjs вѓ┤вХђВЌљВёю id/name/category consistency check(ERR_CATALOG_MISMATCH hard-failВЮё ┬Д8.8ВЮў 3Ж░ю ERRВЌљ ВХћЖ░ђ), manifest.json body_hashвіћ в╣ївЊю ьЃђВъё Ж▓ђВдЮвДї ВѕўьќЅ вЪ░ьЃђВъё вг┤Ж▓░Вё▒ Ж▓ђВѓг ВЌєВЮї. ЖИ░Ж░Ђ: Option ╬▒(drift вѕёВаЂ, Gap 1/2 fix ВѕўвЈЎ sync вХђвІ┤), Option ╬▓(nexus-core shared lib PR в│ЉьЋЕ вїђЖИ░Ж░ђ Issue #1ВЮў 7ВЮ╝ вИївъюВ╣ў ВѕўвфЁ ВЃЂьЋюЖ│╝ ВќЉвдй вХѕЖ░ђ), Option ╬┤(ВЎёВаё вЈЁвдй ЖхгьўёВЮђ verifyBodyHash/verifyTagDrift Ж░ЎВЮђ ВѕўьЋЎВаЂВю╝вАю вЈЎВЮ╝ьЋю вАюВДЂВЮё ВъгВъЉВё▒ьЋўвіћ вг┤Ж░ђВ╣ўьЋю в░ћьђ┤ Въгв░ювфЁ, Gap 1/2 workaround вѕёвЮй ВюёьЌў).

issues.title: ьЋўвЊюВйћвћЕ ВаюЖ▒░ в▓ћВюё/ВѕюВёю (agents, skills, tags, vocabulary) в░Ј tag ьЋИвЊцвЪг вЈЎВаЂ вЊ▒вАЮ ьЃђВЮ┤в░Ї
issues.decision:
4-commit bisectable sequence ьЎЋВаЋ в░Ј ьїїВЮ╝ вДцьіИвдГВіц Ж│аВаЋ.

Commit #1 (`chore: add nexus-core devDependency + generate scaffold`): package.json devDependenciesВЌљ `@moreih29/nexus-core: ^0.1.2` ВХћЖ░ђ, bun install, scripts/generate-from-nexus-core.{mjs,lib.mjs} ВІаЖию (claude-nexusВЌљВёю ьЈгьїЁ, в▓ёВаё ьЃюЖ╣Ё ВБ╝ВёЮ), opencode В░еВЮ┤Ваљ ВѕўВаЋ(MODEL_TIER_TO_OPENCODE, harness_mapping.opencode, TS literal emit). ВЮ┤ commitВЌљВёювіћ generate в»ИВІцьќЅ.

Commit #2 (`feat: generate prompts.generated.ts + barrel replacement`): package.json scriptsВЌљ generate:prompts ВХћЖ░ђ, buildвіћ `bun run generate:prompts && tsc -p tsconfig.json`Вю╝вАю ВѕўВаЋ. src/agents/prompts.ts ВѓГВаю ьЏё `export { AGENT_PROMPTS, AGENT_META } from './prompts.generated.js'` re-export barrel, src/skills/prompts.ts вЈЎВЮ╝. prompts.generated.ts ьїїВЮ╝ВЮђ git tracked (claude-nexus ьїеьё┤Ж│╝ вЈЎВЮ╝, .gitignore в»ИьЈгьЋе).

Commit #3 (`feat: capability resolution + HANDLED_TAG_IDS drift check + isEditLikeTool вїђВ▓┤`): AGENT_META.disallowedToolsЖ░ђ capability Рєњ harness_mapping.opencode ьЋ┤ВёЮ Ж▓░Ж│╝вАю literal inline, generate-from-nexus-core.mjs вѓ┤вХђВЌљВёю NEXUS_AGENT_CATALOG[id].disallowedTools Рєћ AGENT_META[id].disallowedTools вЈЎвЊ▒Вё▒ Ж▓ђВдЮ (ERR_CATALOG_MISMATCH hard-failВЮё ┬Д8.8 3Ж░ю ERRВЌљ ВХћЖ░ђьЋўВЌг В┤Ю 4Ж░ю), src/shared/tag-parser.tsВЌљ `export const HANDLED_TAG_IDS = ['plan', 'run', 'sync', 'd', 'm', 'm-gc', 'rule'] as const` ВХћЖ░ђ, verifyTagDrift() ьўИВХювАю tags.ymlЖ│╝ ЖхљВ░е Ж▓ђВдЮ, prompts.generated.tsВЌљ `export const NO_FILE_EDIT_TOOLS: readonly string[] = [...]`(no_file_edit capabilityВЮў opencode mapping) ВХћЖ░ђ, src/plugin/hooks.ts:402-404 isEditLikeToolВЮё `NO_FILE_EDIT_TOOLS.includes(toolName)`Вю╝вАю ьЋю Вцё ВѕўВаЋ.

Commit #4 (`test: replace e2e-prompt-parity with ┬Д8.7 triple`): scripts/e2e-prompts-generated.mjs (AGENT_PROMPTS/SKILL_PROMPTS ВА┤ВъгВё▒), scripts/e2e-capability-coverage.mjs (AGENT_META.disallowedTools resolution, unknown opencode tool nameВЮђ warning-level per ┬Д10.2), scripts/e2e-loader-smoke.mjs (dist/index.jsвЦ╝ nexus-core ВЌєВЮ┤ вАювЊю, devDependency contract) ВІаЖию. package.json test:e2eВЌљВёю e2e-prompt-parity.mjs ВаюЖ▒░ + 3Ж░ю ВХћЖ░ђ, scripts/e2e-prompt-parity.mjs ВѓГВаю. ВхюВбЁ 24Ж░ю e2e ВіцьЂгвдйьіИ.

ьїїВЮ╝ вДцьіИвдГВіц: src/agents/prompts.ts ВѓГВаюРєњbarrel(#2), src/agents/catalog.ts as-is(┬Д8.6), src/agents/prompts.generated.ts ВІаЖию(#2/#3), src/skills/prompts.ts ВѓГВаюРєњbarrel(#2), src/skills/catalog.ts as-is, src/skills/prompts.generated.ts ВІаЖию(#2), src/shared/tag-parser.ts HANDLED_TAG_IDS ВЃЂВѕў ВХћЖ░ђ(#3, NATURAL_PLAN/RUN_PATTERNSвіћ Phase 1 ВаюВЎИ ВюаВДђ), src/plugin/hooks.ts:402-404 isEditLikeTool ьЋю Вцё ВѕўВаЋ(#3), src/create-config.ts as-is, src/pipeline/evaluator.ts as-is(Phase 1 ВаюВЎИ).

Q5 ВъгВаЋВЮў: "tag ьЋИвЊцвЪг вЈЎВаЂ вЊ▒вАЮ"ВЮ┤ ВЋёвІѕвЮ╝ "tag idВЮў single source of truth" Рђћ HANDLED_TAG_IDS ВаЋВаЂ ВЃЂВѕў(tag-parser.ts) + verifyTagDrift() в╣ївЊю ьЃђВъё ЖхљВ░е Ж▓ђВдЮВю╝вАю ьЋ┤Ж▓░. вЈЎВаЂ loading ВЌєВЮї, ┬Д9.2 runtime Ж│хВюа в░░Ваю ВЏљВ╣Ў ВцђВѕў. claude-nexusВЎђ вЈЎВЮ╝ ьїеьё┤.

Phase 1 ВаюВЎИ (Phase 1 ВЮ┤ьЏё в│ёвЈё ьЃюВіцьЂг): NATURAL_PLAN_PATTERNS/NATURAL_RUN_PATTERNS ВъљВЌ░Вќ┤ Ж░љВДђ(Issue #6ВЌљВёю nexus-core Ж▓йЖ│ё ьїљвІе), src/pipeline/evaluator.ts editsAllowed throw ьїеьё┤(ВаёьЎўЖ│╝ вЈЁвдй), src/create-config.ts:55-61 buildToolPolicy(в│ђьЎў вАюВДЂвДї, ВъЁваЦ catalog.tsВЌљВёю Ж│хЖИЅ), src/agents/catalog.ts вѓ┤вХђ ЖхгВА░ в│ђЖ▓й(┬Д8.6 as-is).

issues.title: nexus-core ВЮ┤Віѕ ВаюВХю вфЕвАЮ (postdoc no_shell_exec gap, lib shared Ві╣Ж▓Е, manual_only semantic, natural-language tag Ж▓йЖ│ё)
issues.decision:
nexus-coreВЌљ вІеВЮ╝ ьєхьЋЕ ВЮ┤ВіѕвАю 4Ж░ю Gap ВаюВХю (Option i, claude-nexus #2 ьїеьё┤). ВаюВХю ВІюВаљ: Phase 1 commit #1(nexus-core devDependency ВёцВ╣ў) ВДЂьЏё.

Gap 1 (Must) Рђћ **`no_shell_exec` capability вХђВъг**: bridge ┬Д10.1ВЮ┤ "opencode-nexus catalogЖ░ђ вДъЖ│а nexus-coreВЌљ no_shell_exec ВюаВДђ, claude-nexus postdocВЌљ Bash В░евІе PR"ВЮё Ж▓░ВаЋьќѕВю╝вѓў ВІцВаю nexus-core v0.1.2 vocabulary/capabilities.ymlВЌљ ВЮ┤ capabilityЖ░ђ ВЌєВЮї. postdoc/meta.yml capabilities в░░ВЌ┤ВЌљвЈё no_shell_exec вѕёвЮй. opencode-nexusвіћ catalog.ts disallowedToolsВЌљ 'bash'вЦ╝ ьЋўвЊюВйћвћЕ workaround ВюаВДђ ВцЉ. ВаюВЋѕ: capabilities.ymlВЌљ no_shell_exec ВХћЖ░ђ(harness_mapping.opencode: [bash], harness_mapping.claude_code: [Bash]) + agents/postdoc/meta.yml capabilitiesВЌљ no_shell_exec ВХћЖ░ђ.

Gap 2 (Must) Рђћ **skill `manual_only` runtime semantic вфЁВёИ вХђВъг**: nx-setup, nx-initВЮў meta.ymlВЌљ manual_only: trueЖ░ђ ВъѕВю╝вѓў semantic("LLM ВъљвЈЎ в░ювЈЎ ЖИѕВДђ, ВѓгВџЕВъљ ВѕўвЈЎ triggerвДї ьЌѕВџЕ")ВЮ┤ schema/skill.schema.json вўљвіћ .nexus/context/boundaries.md Вќ┤вћћВЌљвЈё вфЁВІю ВЌєВЮї. Phase-2 adoption brief ┬Д5ВЌљвДї ЖИ░вАЮ. opencode-nexus hooks.ts experimental.chat.system.transform Жхгьўё ВІю canonical spec ьЋёВџћ. ВаюВЋѕ: skill.schema.jsonВЮў manual_only ьЋёвЊю descriptionВЌљ contract ВХћЖ░ђ вўљвіћ context/boundaries.mdВЌљ manual_only contract Вё╣ВЁў ВХћЖ░ђ.

Gap 3 (Should) Рђћ **generate-from-nexus-core lib shared Ві╣Ж▓Е ВаюВЋѕ**: Issue #2 Option ╬│ВЮў ВъЦЖИ░ path. claude-nexusВЎђ opencode-nexusЖ░ђ harness-agnostic вАюВДЂ(verifyBodyHash, verifyTagDrift, loadHandledTagIdsFromGate, SKILL_PURPOSE_OVERRIDE, deriveDisallowedTools, verifyManifestVersion)ВЮё Ж░ЂВъљ в│хВѓг в│┤Вюа. boundary ВДѕвгИ: nexus-coreЖ░ђ "prompt-only" ВЏљВ╣Ў ьЋўВЌљВёю consumer-facing build libвЦ╝ ВєїВюаьЋа Вѕў ВъѕвіћЖ░ђ. brief ┬Д2 ВаюВЎИ вфЕвАЮВЌљ "в╣ївЊю вЈёЖхг lib"віћ ВЌєВЮї. ВаюВЋѕ: scripts/consumer-lib.mjs Ві╣Ж▓Е + package.json exportsВЌљ ./consumer-lib subpath ВХћЖ░ђ, transformAgent/transformSkillВЮё emitFormat Вйюв░▒Вю╝вАю ьїївЮ╝в»Иьё░ьЎћ. Ві╣Ж▓Е ВІю Gap 1/2 fix ВъљвЈЎ Ж│хВюа ВЮ┤Ваљ.

Gap 4 (Should) Рђћ **NATURAL language tag detection Ж▓йЖ│ё ьїљВаЋ**: opencode-nexus src/shared/tag-parser.ts:4-15ВЮў NATURAL_PLAN_PATTERNS(/Ж│ёьџЇ/, /ВёцЖ│ё/, /вХёВёЮьЋ┤/ вЊ▒)ВЎђ NATURAL_RUN_PATTERNS(/ВІцьќЅьЋ┤/, /ЖхгьўёьЋ┤/ вЊ▒)Ж░ђ consumer ВєїВюаВЮИВДђ semi-canonicalВЮИВДђ ьїљВаЋ ьЋёВџћ. brief ┬Д2 "Runtime I/Oвіћ consumer ВєїВюа"Ж░ђ raw matching patternЖ╣їВДђ В╗цв▓ёьЋўвіћВДђ вХѕвХёвфЁ. ВаюВЋѕ: .nexus/context/boundaries.mdВЌљ "natural language patternsвіћ consumer ВєїВюа, vocabularyВЌљ ьјИВъЁьЋўВДђ ВЋіВЮї" вфЁВІюьЋўЖ▒░вѓў, в░ўвїђвАю optional hint format ВаюЖ│х. Lead opinion ВџћВ▓Г.

ВЮ┤Віѕ ВаюВХю ьўЋВІЮ (claude-nexus #2 ЖхгВА░ ЖиИвїђвАю): Context Рєњ Gap N (Current state / Impact on opencode-nexus / Proposal) ├Ќ 4 Рєњ Current opencode-nexus workarounds Рєњ Desired flow Рєњ Labels (validation, enhancement, consumer-feedback, architecture) Рєњ Related (opencode-nexus phase 1 commit SHA, bridge ┬Д10.1, Phase-2 adoption brief).

Desired flow в│ИвгИ:
1. nexus-core maintainerЖ░ђ ВЮ┤ ВЮ┤Віѕ вдгви░
2. Gapв│ё adopt/reject/alternative Ж▓░ВаЋ
3. nexus-coreВЌљВёю ьЋЕВЮўвљю в│ђЖ▓й Жхгьўё
4. opencode-nexusЖ░ђ workaround ВаюЖ▒░ follow-up PR:
   - catalog.ts postdoc bash ьЋўвЊюВйћвћЕ ВаюЖ▒░ Рєњ no_shell_exec capability ВѓгВџЕ (Gap 1)
   - hooks.tsВЌљ manual_only skill В░евІе вАюВДЂ ВХћЖ░ђ (Gap 2)
   - generate-from-nexus-core.{mjs,lib.mjs}вЦ╝ shared lib importвАю ЖхљВ▓┤ (Gap 3 merge ВІю)
5. claude-nexusЖ░ђ в│ёвЈё PR: postdoc.md frontmatterВЌљ Bash В░евІе ВХћЖ░ђ (bridge ┬Д10.1 action)

Phase 1 blockьЋўВДђ ВЋіВЮї: opencode-nexusвіћ workaround(catalog.ts ьЋўвЊюВйћвћЕ + hooks В░евІе вАюВ╗г вАюВДЂ)вАю Phase 1 ВЎёвБї. nexus-core веИВДђ ьЏё cleanup PR в│ёвЈё ВДёьќЅ.

ВаюВЎИьЋю ьЏёв│┤: claude-nexus #2 Gap 1/2/3віћ ВЮ┤в»И ВаюВХювље, pipeline evaluator editsAllowed(nexus-code ВєїЖ┤ђ, 04-OPEN_QUESTIONS Q3), ERR ьЃђВъЁ standardization(claude-nexus #2 Gap 1Ж│╝ ВцЉв│х), skill dispatch вЕћВ╗цвІѕВдў(Gap 2вАю В╗цв▓ё).

issues.title: opencode-nexus trusted publishing ВаёьЎў (OIDC)
issues.decision:
claude-nexus publish-npm.ymlВЮё ЖИ░ВцђВю╝вАю ьЈгьїЁ, Must 5 + Should 3 вфевЉљ ВаЂВџЕ. в│ёвЈё PRвАю Phase 1 ВІюВъЉ Ваё веИВДђ.

Must в│ђЖ▓й:
1. Node 20 Рєњ Node 24 (line 28) Рђћ npm 11+ ьЋёВџћ, Trusted Publishing ВА░Ж▒┤
2. `registry-url` ВаюЖ▒░ (line 29) Рђћ setup-nodeВЌљ ВъѕВю╝вЕ┤ NODE_AUTH_TOKEN ВъљвЈЎ ВБ╝ВъЁвљўВќ┤ OIDC Вџ░ьџї
3. `NODE_AUTH_TOKEN` env ВаюЖ▒░ (line 45-46) Рђћ token Ж▓йвАю ВЎёВаё В░евІе
4. `secrets.NPM_TOKEN` В░ИВА░ ВаюЖ▒░ (workflowВЌљВёювДї, GitHub repo secret ВъљВ▓┤ ВѓГВаювіћ ВѓгВџЕВъљ ВѕўвЈЎ)
5. ьїїВЮ╝ ьЌцвЇћ ВБ╝ВёЮ ВХћЖ░ђ Рђћ "OIDC Trusted Publishing only" + `registry-url` ЖИѕВДђ ВѓгВюа + Trusted Publisher вЊ▒вАЮ ВаЋв│┤ (moreih29/opencode-nexus + publish-npm.yml)

Should в│ђЖ▓й:
6. `concurrency` group: `publish-${{ github.ref }}`, `cancel-in-progress: false` Рђћ вЈЎВІю publish в░ЕВДђ
7. Version match check: git tag v* Рєћ package.json.version ЖхљВ░е Ж▓ђВдЮ (release ьћёвАюВёИВіц formalize Ваё ВЋѕВаёВъЦВ╣ў)
8. `workflow_dispatch` dry_run input: pack only, skip publish ВўхВЁў

Bun version: ЖИ░ВА┤ `1.3.9` Рєњ `"1.3"` (loose pinning, claude-nexusВЎђ ВЮ╝В╣ў).

Build chain Ж│авац (Issue #3 commit #2ВЎђ ВЌ░Ж│ё): check/test:e2e ВіцьЂгвдйьіИ вѓ┤вХђВЌљВёю generate:prompts ВъљвЈЎ ьўИВХю Рђћ Issue #3 commit #2ВЌљВёю package.jsonВЮў build/check/test:e2e ВёИ ВіцьЂгвдйьіИЖ░ђ вфевЉљ generate:promptsвЦ╝ ВёаьќЅьЋўвЈёвАЮ ВѕўВаЋ. workflowвіћ build chain вѓ┤вХђ ВѕюВёювЦ╝ вф░вЮ╝вЈё вље (Option a В▒ёьЃЮ).

PR вХёвдг: в│ёвЈё PR (PR #A: trusted publishing workflowвДї ВѕўВаЋ). Phase 1 feature branchВЎђ ВДЂЖхљьЋўВЌг mainВЌљ ве╝Вађ веИВДђ. Phase 1 вИївъюВ╣ў(PR #B, 4-commit bisectable)віћ Ж╣евЂЌьЋю OIDC workflow ВюёВЌљВёю ВІюВъЉ. В▓Ф publishвіћ Phase 1 в▓ёВаё ьЃюЖиИ(Вўѕ: v0.2.0) ьЉИВІю ВІю OIDCвАю ВѕўьќЅ.

Phase 1 ВЎёвБї Ваё В▓Ф publish В▓┤ьЂгвдгВіцьіИ:
(a) `bun run generate:prompts`Ж░ђ prompts.generated.ts ВЃЮВё▒ Рђћ вАюВ╗г ьЎЋВЮИ
(b) prompts.generated.tsЖ░ђ git tracked Рђћ commit ВА┤Въг ьЎЋВЮИ
(c) `npm pack --dry-run`ВЌљВёю dist/ВЎђ templates/ВЌљ generated ьїїВЮ╝ ьЈгьЋе ьЎЋВЮИ (files: ["dist", "templates"])
(d) npm web UIВЌљВёю Trusted Publisher вЊ▒вАЮ ьЎЋВЮИ (ВѓгВџЕВъљ ВѕўьќЅ ВЎёвБї вфЁВІювље)
(e) GitHub repo secretsВЌљВёю NPM_TOKEN ВѓГВаю ьЎЋВЮИ (ВѓгВџЕВъљ ВѕўвЈЎ)
(f) workflow_dispatch dry_runВю╝вАю pre-release Ж▓ђВдЮ (ВёаьЃЮ)

Issue #1 7ВЮ╝ вИївъюВ╣ў ВѕўвфЁ ВЃЂьЋюЖ│╝ ВХЕвЈї ВЌєВЮї: PR #AЖ░ђ ве╝Вађ веИВДђвљўЖ│а PR #BЖ░ђ вћ░вАю ВІюВъЉ.

plan.research_summary:
## ьўёВъг ВЃЂьЃю (opencode-nexus)

- **v0.1.0**, `@moreih29/nexus-core` ВЋёВДЂ dependencyВЌљ ВЌєВЮї (node_modulesВЌљвЈё в»ИВёцВ╣ў). `publishConfig.access: public`вДї ВёцВаЋвље.
- `src/agents/catalog.ts` (12-85Вцё): 9Ж░ю ВЌљВЮ┤ВаёьіИ NEXUS_AGENT_CATALOG. disallowedTools в░░ВЌ┤ ьЈгьЋе Рђћ architect/designer/strategistвіћ [edit,write,patch,multiedit,nx_task_add,nx_task_update], postdocВЮђ ВХћЖ░ђвАю bash, engineer/writerвіћ [nx_task_add], tester/reviewerвіћ [edit,write,patch,multiedit,nx_task_add].
- `src/agents/prompts.ts` (740Вцё): AGENT_PROMPTS Record ьўЋВІЮ ьЋўвЊюВйћвћЕ.
- `src/skills/catalog.ts` (8-39Вцё): 5Ж░ю Віцьѓг (nx-plan, nx-run, nx-init, nx-sync, nx-setup).
- `src/skills/prompts.ts` (207Вцё): SKILL_PROMPTS Record.
- `src/shared/tag-parser.ts`: `[plan]`, `[run]`, `[d]`, `[rule(?::*)?]` regex + AGENT_ALIASESВЌљ 9Ж░ю ьЋюЖИђ alias ьЋўвЊюВйћвћЕ. `[m]`, `[m:gc]`, `[sync]`віћ ВЮ┤ ьїїВёюВЌљВёю в╣аВаИ ВъѕВЮї.
- `src/plugin/hooks.ts` (1017Вцё): event/tool.execute.before/tool.execute.after/chat.message/command.execute.before/experimental.session.compacting/experimental.chat.system.transform ьЏЁ вЊ▒вАЮ. `isEditLikeTool()` (402-404Вцё) ьЋўвЊюВйћвћЕ. tool.execute.beforeВЌљВёю pipeline evaluator ьўИВХю.
- `src/pipeline/evaluator.ts` (185Вцё): editsAllowed throw ьїеьё┤. taskCycleState ЖИ░в░ў ЖХїьЋю.
- `src/create-config.ts:55-61`: buildToolPolicyвАю disallowedTools Рєњ OpenCode agent config.
- `docs/bridge/nexus-core-bootstrap.md`: 98KB / 1946Вцё. ┬Д8(line 1524-1662) opencode-nexus integration, ┬Д9.2(line 1662+) runtime Ж│хВюа в░░Ваю ВЏљВ╣Ў. bridge-quotes.mdВЌљ ьЋхВІг ВЮИВџЕ в│┤ВА┤вље.
- `UPSTREAM.md`: ВЮ┤в»И sibling Ж┤ђЖ│ё, canonical source, bidirectional flip, 90-day re-evaluation, Phase 2 trigger ВаЋВЮўвље. "4-layer ВДђВІЮ Ж│ёВИх ЖхгВА░ ВюаВДђ"вЦ╝ intentional divergenceвАю вфЁВІю.
- `.nexus/` ЖхгВА░: ВЮ┤в»И flat ЖхгВА░(memory/, rules/, state/)ВЎђ 4-layer ЖхгВА░(core/{identity,codebase,reference})Ж░ђ **Ж│хВА┤**. core/identity, core/codebaseвіћ opencode-nexus Ж│аВюа, memory/opencode-nexus/віћ nexus-tempВЌљВёю ВаёвІгвљю вИївдгьЋЉ ВёИьіИ.

## nexus-core v0.1.2 ЖхгВА░

- **manifest.json** (4ffc1e0 commit, schema_contract_version 1.0): 9 agents + 5 skills + vocabularyВЮў body_hash ьЈгьЋе snapshot. consumerЖ░ђ вІеВЮ╝ ьїїВЮ╝ catalog lookup Ж░ђвіЦ.
- **9 agents**: architect(how/persistent/high), designer(how/persistent/high), postdoc(how/persistent/high), strategist(how/persistent/high), engineer(do/bounded/standard), writer(do/bounded/standard), researcher(do/persistent/standard), tester(check/ephemeral/standard), reviewer(check/ephemeral/standard). meta.yml 9ьЋёвЊю ЖхгВА░.
- **5 skills**: nx-plan(triggers:[plan], variants:[auto]), nx-run(triggers:[run]), nx-sync(triggers:[sync]), nx-setup(manual_only:true), nx-init(manual_only:true).
- **vocabulary/capabilities.yml**: 3Ж░ю capabilityвДї ВаЋВЮў Рђћ `no_file_edit`, `no_task_create`, `no_task_update`. **Ж░ЂЖ░Ђ harness_mapping.opencode ьѓцВЌљ tool ВЮ┤вдё в░░ВЌ┤ ВА┤Въг**: no_file_editРєњ[edit,write,patch,multiedit], no_task_createРєњ[nx_task_add], no_task_updateРєњ[nx_task_update]. **`no_shell_exec` ВЌєВЮї**.
- **vocabulary/tags.yml**: 7 entries / 9 triggers. skill tags 3(plan+variants:[auto], run, sync), inline action tags 4(dРєњnx_plan_decide, mРєњmemory_store, m-gcРєњmemory_gc, rule+variants:[*]Рєњrule_store).
- **postdoc meta.yml capabilities**: [no_file_edit, no_task_create, no_task_update]вДї. **bash ьЌѕВџЕ ВЃЂьЃю** (canonical).
- **schema/**: common/agent/skill/vocabulary/manifest 5 files (draft 2020-12, additionalProperties: false).
- **CONSUMING.md**: 5-file upgrade protocol, nx-car marker regex, File Contracts, Consumer Setup template. manifest.jsonВЮё ве╝Вађ ВЮйЖ│а CHANGELOGВЮў `<!-- nx-car:vX.Y.Z:start/end -->` вДѕВ╗ц ВіцВ║ћ.
- **OIDC trusted publishing** ВЎёвБї (NPM_TOKEN ВѓГВаювље, `npm publish --provenance --access public`, Bun publish ЖИѕВДђ, registry-url setup-node ЖИѕВДђ).
- `.nexus/rules/semver-policy.md`: 18-case ьЉю, "ВЮўВІгВіцвЪгВџ░вЕ┤ minor" heuristic.

## Phase-2 adoption brief ьЋхВІг ВаюВЋй

- nexus-coreвіћ prompt-only + harness-neutral + model-neutral. hook/runtime/MCP/CLIвіћ consumer ВєїВюа.
- **Capability resolutionВЮђ consumer В▒ЁВъё**: `node_modules/@moreih29/nexus-core/vocabulary/capabilities.yml` ВЮйЖ│а harness_mapping.opencode в░░ВЌ┤ВЮё ЖИ░ВА┤ В░евІе вЕћВ╗цвІѕВдў(create-config.ts buildToolPolicy, hooks.ts isEditLikeTool)ВЌљ ВБ╝ВъЁ.
- **migration planВЮђ consumerЖ░ђ ВДЂВаЉ plan sessionВю╝вАю Вѕўвдй**. nexus-coreвіћ migration decisionВЮё shipьЋўВДђ ВЋіВЮї.
- **tester ВџЕВќ┤ ВаЋваг**: opencode-nexusвіћ ВЮ┤в»И `tester`вАю consistent (qa legacy ВЌєВЮї).
- W4 historical note: body prose В░еВЏљ ВаЋвагВЮ┤вЕ░ meta.yml ьЋёвЊюВЌљвіћ qa/tester ВЌєВЮї.

## ВЮ┤в»И ВаюВХювљю ВЃЂвЦў ВЮ┤Віѕ (moreih29/nexus-core#2)

claude-nexusЖ░ђ ВаюВХюьЋю 3Ж░ђВДђ gap:
- **Gap 1**: tags.yml trigger/id consistency Ж▓ђВдЮ вХђВъг (Gate 11 ВаюВЋѕ). opencode-nexusвЈё вЈЎВЮ╝ ВўЂьќЦ Рђћ `t.trigger`вЦ╝ ВІавб░ьЋ┤ВЋ╝ ьЋе.
- **Gap 2**: skill meta.ymlВЌљ harness-display `purpose` ьЋёвЊю ВЌєВЮї. 5-entry SKILL_PURPOSE_OVERRIDEвАю workaround ВцЉ.
- **Gap 3**: DO/CHECK agent artifact_granularity hint ВЌєВЮї. в│Љваг вХёьЋ┤ ьїљвІе Жи╝Ж▒░ вХђВъг.

ВЮ┤ 3Ж░ювіћ opencode-nexusвЈё вЈЎВЮ╝ ВўЂьќЦВЮё в░ЏВю╝вЕ░ ВЮ┤в»И ВЃЂвЦў ВЮ┤ВіѕвАю ВаюВХювље Рєњ **opencode-nexusВЌљВёю ВъгВаюВХю вХѕьЋёВџћ**. opencode-nexus Ж┤ђВаљВЌљВёювіћ ВЮ┤ ВЮ┤Віѕ #2 ьЋ┤Ж▓░ВЮё ЖИ░вІцвдгЖ▒░вѓў, opencode-nexus Ж│аВюаВЮў ВХћЖ░ђ gapвДї ВаюВХю.

## opencode-nexus Ж│аВюа gap ьЏёв│┤

1. **`no_shell_exec` capability вХђВъг**: opencode-nexus postdocВЮ┤ ВЌГВѓгВаЂВю╝вАю bash В░евІе. nexus-core canonicalВЌљ ВЮ┤ capabilityЖ░ђ ВЌєВќ┤Вёю "postdoc bash В░евІе ВюаВДђ"вЦ╝ canonicalвАю ьЉюьўёьЋа в░Ев▓ЋВЮ┤ ВЌєВЮї. ВёаьЃЮВДђ: (a) canonical вћ░вЮ╝ bash ьЋ┤Ваю, (b) `no_shell_exec` ВХћЖ░ђ ВЮ┤Віѕ ВаюВХю.
2. **skill manual_only вЪ░ьЃђВъё semantic вфЁВёИ вХђВъг**: manual_only: trueЖ░ђ "LLM ВъљвЈЎ в░ювЈЎ ЖИѕВДђ + ВѓгВџЕВъљ ВѕўвЈЎ triggerвДї"ВЮ┤вЮ╝віћ Ж▓ЃВЮђ briefВЌљвДї ВъѕВЮї. tags.ymlВЮ┤вѓў skill schema вгИВёюВЌљ ВЮ┤ semanticВЮ┤ вфЁВІювљўВќ┤ ВъѕвіћВДђ ВъгьЎЋВЮИ ьЋёВџћ. hooks.tsВЮў experimental.chat.system.transformВЌљВёю Вќ┤вќ╗Ж▓ї в░ўВўЂьЋаВДђ Жи╝Ж▒░Ж░ђ ьЋёВџћ.
3. **tag-parser natural language detection (ьЋюЖИђ вЊ▒)**: opencode-nexusвіћ ВъљВЌ░Вќ┤ ьїеьё┤("Ж│ёьџЇ", "ВёцЖ│ё", "вХёВёЮьЋ┤")Вю╝вАю mode Ж░љВДђьЋўвіћ NATURAL_PLAN_PATTERNS/NATURAL_RUN_PATTERNSвЦ╝ Ж░ђВДђЖ│а ВъѕВЮї. nexus-coreВЌљвіћ canonical ВъљВЌ░Вќ┤ ьїеьё┤ вфЕвАЮВЮ┤ ВЌєВЮї. ВЮ┤Ж▓ї consumerВЌљ ВєЇьЋўвіћВДђ nexus-coreВЌљ ВєЇьЋўвіћВДђ Ж▓йЖ│ё ьїљвІе ьЋёВџћ (brief ┬Д2ВЌљ вћ░вЦ┤вЕ┤ "Runtime I/Oвіћ consumer ВєїВюа"ВДђвДї "ВќИВќ┤ ьїеьё┤"ВЮђ semi-canonicalВЮ╝ Вѕў ВъѕВЮї).

## ВаюВЋй

- bridge 98KB Ж│ёьџЇ ВъгВъЉВё▒ ЖИѕВДђ (03-IMPLEMENTATION_GUIDE.md Ж▒░Ваѕ 1).
- permission.ask ьЏЁ ВЮўВА┤ ЖИѕВДђ (ВІцьЌў E1, issue #7006).
- tool.execute.before ьЏЁ в▓ћВюё ВЌёЖ▓Еьъѕ ВаюьЋю (ВІцьЌў E3, issue #5894).
- opencode acp adapter ВъЉВё▒ ЖИѕВДђ (nexus-code ВєїВюа).
- ACP vocabularyвЦ╝ nexus-coreВЌљ ьјИВъЁ ВІювЈё ЖИѕВДђ.
- runtime Ж│хВюа в░░Ваю ВЏљВ╣Ў(┬Д9.2): в╣ївЊю ьЃђВъё Вєїв╣ёвДї ьЌѕВџЕ. nexus-core ВЮИВіцьё┤Віц вЪ░ьЃђВъё Ж│хВюа ЖИѕВДђ.
